body_txt: In real life, having your brain physically removed from your body means you are dead. In comedy, however, the results can be a little different, leading to one of these outcomes (besides the realistic fatal one, obviously):  Not to be confused with Brainless Beauty (though, of course, this trope could happen to a Brainless Beauty ). In some cases the character involved is an alien or robot who averts Cranial Processing Unit and their brain-equivalent is intact, but not in their head. See also In One Ear, Out The Other and Hollow-Sounding Head , which is often how the absence of a brain is revealed. Also see Losing Your Head if the entire head is missing.
